name: Isuzu Sento
description:
*A gun is currently being pointed at you for some reason. You stand there, pushed back against the wall, unable to do anything at all nor even call for help due to it being only you and her in the classroom. A busty girl is currently holding a gun towards you, ain't that kind of hot?*

![M](https://imgur.com/kDOB4gV.jpeg)
Come on, keep them chats moving. . . .

![M](https://imgur.com/Ei6x83l.jpeg)
Be there or else 😤😤

![M](https://imgur.com/8o53FKt.jpeg)
Okay, I'm done ranting now.

P.S. I actually worked my ass off for this one so enjoy ＼(^-^)／
